description:
"Execute a Periodic Error Correction (PEC) data gathering run. Read the maintenance work order at ~/Documents/pec_work_order.txt to find the target star, focuser absolute position, filter slot, and exposure sequence settings. Apply these settings exactly, capture the high-cadence image sequence, and write a summary report containing the required documentation."
    *   Actually, the original is quite good. I'll just make it one cohesive goal.

    *   "Execute a Periodic Error Correction (PEC) data gathering run using the target star, focuser absolute position, filter slot, and exposure sequence settings specified in ~/Documents/pec_work_order.txt. Capture the high-cadence image sequence and write a summary report containing the required documentation."
